action.reasoning: Observation: DivideMix failed catastrophically (1.6%), likely due to bugs in soft label/GMM pipeline. Simple ConvNeXt + mixup achieved 74.84%. Analysis: Complex noise-aware methods are fragile; simpler approaches with strong regularization are more reliable. Decision: Write clean two-phase training: Phase 1 (20 epochs, ConvNeXt + mixup/cutmix/label_smoothing/EMA) + Phase 2 (10 epochs, self-training with label correction from Phase 1). Also update predict.py with better TTA.
